title: Emerald Equipment
description: Adds emerald armor and tools to Minecraft: 1.21.2+
body:
This is a simple datapack that just adds emerald armor and tools using the new item components in the latest update. When downloading, make sure to download the required resourcepack as well as the datapack. You may use this datapack anywhere you want such as on a Minecraft server or YouTube video, as long as you credit me and add a link to this post.

Other than that you are free to use this anywhere you want!

Discord:
https://discord.gg/fYyf9WPD
